bead.title: Stage 4.8: Beads cross-project combined view at /nodes/:nodeId/beads
bead.description: New files: src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/beads/+page.svelte, +page.ts. Same list pattern as project-scoped, but merges beads across all projects. Project-name badge column. Project filter chips. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 4 bead #42.
bead.acceptance: (1) MANUAL: load /nodes/:nodeId/beads. (2) See beads from every registered project. (3) Project-name badge shows for each row. (4) Project filter chips work. Record project count in completion note.
